name: formal-methods
description: Formal modeling and hypothesis-driven debugging using Alloy 6 and Dafny.

interface.shortDescription: Model, verify, and debug systems with Alloy 6 and Dafny.
interface.longDescription: Formal modeling and hypothesis-driven debugging skills for software systems, business processes, state machines, permission matrices, API contracts, and root-cause investigations. Includes Alloy 6 and Dafny runners, examples, self-models, and reconciliation workflows.
defaultPrompt: Use formal-modeling to verify this state machine.
Use formal-debugger to investigate this bug.
Model these business rules in Alloy.
